title: 2/16/2024 — Jipp says he feels like he's going to die young
html:
2/16/2024 — Jipp says he feels like he's going to die young

Source: 2024-02-17 Apple Note. One-line quote-capture dated 2/16/2024: "Jipp says he says he feels like he's going to die young." A single-sentence note that nonetheless lands hard given the Cam Jipp arc.

TL;DR

  • The quote: "Jipp says he says he feels like he's going to die young." (the doubled "he says" suggests Yahir was writing in real-time mid-conversation or recall.)
  • Captured Feb 17 about a Feb 16 conversation — same-day-or-next-day urgency.
  • Adds a mortality-anxiety data point to the Cam Jipp entity, deepening the friend-portrait beyond the fantasy-football / friend-group context.
  • Sits inside the same neighborhood as "you are going to die soon" (Yahir's own version, 7 months later) — friends thinking about mortality before they're 25.
  • Written senior-year-spring at OSU, when Jipp would have been a similar college-end transition year.

Pattern

Yahir periodically captures friend-quotes verbatim (Carnegie, various Trav lines). This is the most stripped version — no commentary, no resolution, just the line landing.

Open questions

  • Was this a passing comment or part of a deeper conversation Yahir didn't write down?
  • Did this color how Yahir treated the friendship after — did he reach out more deliberately?
  • What was Jipp's life-context Feb 2024 that prompted this?

Related

  • 2024 09 12 never forget do whatever
  • memento mori decision filter
  • osu
